pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.2 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 for the build.
Update spring-cloud-gateway-mvc to 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
Replace deprecated springfox-swagger dependencies with springdoc-openapi-starter for OpenAPI 3 support in Spring Boot 3.
Add explicit javax.validation dependency to resolve API changes in Jakarta EE migration.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Install Maven manually since the new base image does not include it.
Install Node.js via nvm to replace the previous NodeSource setup script, ensuring compatibility with the new environment.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Explicitly define the Storybook framework as react-webpack5, which is required for newer Storybook versions.
